message:
perf(autocomplete): async file cache refresh via background thread

Refactor FileCache to perform project file collection on a background
thread instead of blocking the UI event loop:

- Replace synchronous collect_project_files() call with a spawned
  std::thread that sends results back via mpsc::channel
- Add update_rx and updating fields to track in-flight updates
- On each refresh_if_needed() call, poll the channel with try_recv()
  to pick up completed results without blocking
- Remove const from new() and AutocompleteProvider::new() since
  Vec::new() in const context requires nightly features
- Stale files are served while the update is in flight, providing
  zero-latency autocomplete for the common case where the cache
  is slightly out of date but still useful

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
